proposed_relations.description: Relocated bus lane to SB approach of Utica Ave between St. Johns Pl and Carroll St as part of Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Relocates bus lane to SB approach • Provides more parking bet Pres. and Carroll Sts • Reduces bus delays on SB approach to Eastern Pkwy. • Net gain: 19 peak period parking spaces

decisions.rationale: Source p009 explicitly describes relocation of bus lane to SB approach as a proposed improvement on Utica Ave corridor. This is part of the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Relocates bus lane to SB approach • Provides more parking bet Pres. and Carroll Sts • Reduces bus delays on SB approach to Eastern Pkwy. • Net gain: 19 peak period parking spaces

proposed_relations.description: Left turn bays at some intersections along Utica Ave as part of the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Convert one travel lane to "offset" bus lane to reduce speeding, maximize parking, and benefit bus service • To improve safety and traffic flow: add left turn bays at some intersections, prohibit left turns elsewhere • Implement Transit Signal Priority, optimize corridor signal timings

decisions.rationale: Source p011 explicitly states 'add left turn bays at some intersections' as a proposed solution along Utica Ave corridor.

proposed_relations.description: Left turn prohibition at some intersections along Utica Ave as part of the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Convert one travel lane to "offset" bus lane to reduce speeding, maximize parking, and benefit bus service • To improve safety and traffic flow: add left turn bays at some intersections, prohibit left turns elsewhere • Implement Transit Signal Priority, optimize corridor signal timings
• Lenox Road – community concerns about LT ban • Proposal to create LT bay would require curbside bus lane SB • Would require removing 6 parking spaces in front of post office, Citibank

decisions.rationale: Source p011 explicitly proposes prohibiting left turns elsewhere as part of the proposed solutions for Utica Ave. p016 discusses potential left turn bans at Lenox Road.

proposed_relations.description: Transit Signal Priority from Kings Highway to Broadway along Utica Ave corridor as part of the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Optimize traffic signal offsets for all traffic • Increase signal cycle from 60 seconds to 90-120 seconds – Increase green time for Utica Avenue while maintaining safe pedestrian crossing times – Better match cycles at Church, Linden, Eastern Parkway • Implement Transit Signal Priority from Kings Highway to Broadway (with NYCT)

decisions.rationale: Source p017 explicitly states 'Implement Transit Signal Priority from Kings Highway to Broadway (with NYCT)' as part of Traffic Signal Changes for this study.

proposed_relations.description: Bus bulbs at Church Ave intersection as part of the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Busiest single route bus to bus transfer in city • Very high crash location • Proposal for offset bus lanes, bus bulbs, LT prohibition • High traffic volumes
